mapper.insert: INSERT INTO players (id, name, first_name, last_name, age, birth_date, birth_place, birth_country, nationality, height, weight, photo, team_id, league_id, season, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{age}, #{birthDate}, #{birthPlace}, #{birthCountry}, #{nationality}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{photo}, #{teamId}, #{leagueId}, #{season}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE players SET name = #{name}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, age = #{age}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, birth_place = #{birthPlace}, birth_country = #{birthCountry}, nationality = #{nationality}, height = #{height}, weight = #{weight}, photo = #{photo}, team_id = #{teamId}, league_id = #{leagueId}, season = #{season}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from players where id in
#{id}
